page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.s2 family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and runs on the KVM hypervisor. The instance features 2 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 2 vCPUs. It is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. There are no bundled GPUs, and the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The underlying CPU lacks advanced instruction set extensions such as AVX, AVX512, AMX, AES-NI, and SHA extensions, which limits its suitability for heavy cryptographic, vector-based, or matrix-based workloads. Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the instance is structured for entry-level general-purpose workloads, lightweight web serving, small databases, and basic development or testing environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance within the ecs.s2 family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs, operating at 1 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. The processor lacks advanced instruction sets like AVX, AVX512, and AES-NI, which restricts its performance in cryptographic and vector-intensive tasks. This instance is designed for entry-level general-purpose workloads, including lightweight web serving, small database hosting, and development or testing environments where dedicated CPU resources are required without the need for specialized hardware acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for lightweight web serving and development workloads.

tagline: A dedicated two-core virtual machine with a balanced memory profile for entry-level general-purpose workloads and development environments.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs with 1 thread per core
8.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
No local storage or integrated GPU hardware
Suitable for lightweight web serving and development environments
